name: xianyu-good-console
description: 鲸吸购控制台（Mac 客户端，连接远端或本机 xianyu-good 服务）

scripts.build:installer: npm run sync-static && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac --publish never
scripts.build:installer:fresh: npm run sync-static && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac --publish never -c.directories.output=dist-build
scripts.build:dmg: npm run sync-static && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac dmg --publish never
scripts.build:pkg: npm run sync-static && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac pkg --publish never
